meaning: vbl.work的过去式和过去分词adj.做成的,形成的,精炼的,[冶](金属)锻造的
examples: The gates were made of wrought iron.
The storm wrought havoc in the south.
This century wrought major changes in our society.
You come to appreciate what was wrought in painting, architecture, sculpture, writing and music.
It is the damage wrought to Mrs Clinton that is probably the most consequential.
